name: blast-radius-skills
description: Three coordinated skills for AI agent-operated codebases: planner designs blast-radius-aware file structure, executor makes changes safely across bounded context, reviewer verifies correctness before committing.

interface.shortDescription: Plan, execute, and review agent code changes with bounded blast radius
interface.longDescription: Three coordinated skills for codebases operated by AI agents and subagents. blast-radius-planner designs context-safe file structure and outputs CODEBASE_INDEX.yaml and IMPACT_MAP.yaml. blast-radius-executor makes changes safely with four self-selected modes: Bootstrap, Solo, Orchestrator, and Subagent. blast-radius-reviewer verifies correctness and consistency after changes, producing approved, changes-needed, or escalate verdicts. Works on both greenfield and existing projects.
defaultPrompt: Use blast-radius-planner to design the structure for a new feature
Use blast-radius-executor to apply a change across all affected routes
Use blast-radius-reviewer to verify changes before committing
